textByHash.00fd2e9be51daf0af385d3f16841c270295589d1: That's the spirit! I've tried my hand at clay modelling in the past. You can make all sorts of things. Just get some soft clay and a knife and I'm sure you'll be able to make a lovely head.
textByHash.08aa44c86c6f3dde5a1431c17c69160bf528db34: Wait! Come back, we need your help.
textByHash.1106134b30e59b165f3239c1921e00842aca6f1a: Yes hurry up, we need to get back on schedule.
textByHash.123c0bcd9f8635e38e03b95f43ab33a9c94dd1d2: I'm afraid not. It only ever comes in the night, so we haven't been able to get a proper look at it.
textByHash.16560e7d20f5a7454e4cba04bc45d45b2e6bc08c: I don't like talking about that night. I still have nightmares about it.
textByHash.16cb0b96eb07c12d3fd72fd469acd10ec3441c5d: Good to see you again! Anything I can do for you?
textByHash.18959360704439440518ef5628185039ce76b4f6: Thank you for all your help in solving the murder.
textByHash.1c05244bbfa8e7ad1f712e2bba6af997f36790ed: Well I'm sure you're not far off. Keep it up!
textByHash.1d02c30305af032bcb78701ed71186b6d0344a29: What an awful night. It started out normally, I was in the kitchen with Hobbes and Louisa, helping with dinner. They gave me Lord Sinclair's meal. I went to deliver it and I found him...
textByHash.1e09b8ecde546ff9bfdb32cdcf44159cbdbd3513: Well I have to say that mounted head looks awful.
textByHash.2b449610c2b879167b453bb5b9ee2cc7ed788dda: That won't work, the Icelord's magic will interfere.
textByHash.33497a35ff747214b183b3a042310f2b32cc1b2c: Oh that horrible dog is always barking at nothing but I don't think I did...
textByHash.3db579f77d7df87cd65bd4e5632bd9e94946e096: No, I don't remember hearing anything like that.
textByHash.4039b1bfb70bcd6f37b718e221af1a94139b4b05: You're very impressive, what a coincidence that you knew to make a giant piece of gingerbread to protect yourself.
textByHash.40d097bb0f5698b62f50b3ede1b85346c1e8865d: Not really. I can't remember who handled it, if anyone.
textByHash.4222cc3a4f64f9cb961fa368455697d2b0314c62: Oh dear. Well if it keeps him happy, I suppose. There should be a good spot near the stairs.
textByHash.451ce4be7a62b35a134308db80e47281fad39f67: Nothing, really. I didn't buy any.
textByHash.46dd70472d014bc1211d40759f0bd26922637bd9: Oh I don't know... Frank was acting kind of funny... After that big argument him and the Lord had the other day by the beehive... so
textByHash.4a7860e1a3d29b17b3700bd21199f3b7126074dd: No, I didn't pass Anna, I'm sure of that. I think I passed one of the other young Sinclairs though. A man.
textByHash.4de917fbedb26423b61fb320a95d578ade1282a3: Are you okay dear? That sounded quite nasty.
textByHash.4e51d8bd8fb9766c95fd15bf0e891c4506aa6855: No, I was upstairs cleaning when the salesman came by, so I didn't know until after he left that he'd been here.
textByHash.572fcc6c3d5ce913654a3c2e6ac2f6c744f79bb0: Oh dear. I'm afraid Gordon can be quite picky sometimes.
textByHash.5dba1318b1a3647e508185beee96438645cf38f4: No, I never did. And I walked from the kitchen to Lord Sinclair's room, so I would have.
textByHash.5e44849c37a77df2d71c1f227106d654a11a066d: I guess maybe him... but it's really scary to think someone here might have been responsible. I actually hope it was a burglar...
textByHash.621707e4a17251b76d4b025eb3aec74c3e552fd5: We'll be back in full production in no time!
textByHash.6b9d531d14d5d1e96eac76fbf486d28cc58f7cfa: Hello there. Any luck with that head?
textByHash.6bbc0727ac2b0094aae765ffcddb2702b769a4b2: I don't know. They got really secretive after Lord Sinclair was killed and then suddenly left. That's all I know.
textByHash.6f6d65a50d98d41bfb5e179382a1ecf33e95d0df: Well you won't find anything too exciting here I'm afraid. Just farming.
textByHash.7102da345c91f6ad1ec90505f9d4d7e53eaf589f: Oh come on now! You're the adventurer here! Why don't you use your head?
textByHash.7455f1a457edeccc00d6227c6c6feef0146fa590: Well, between you and me, Gordon is a good farmer but I wouldn't say he's a genius by any means. He also doesn't actually know what the beast looks like.
textByHash.776abaa17c9b0427d947f70c0f8230842dbf6835: No, I don't know anything like that. I kept my head down and did my work.
textByHash.79a2ac31776700742caf796da6120b23ae5b2f5e: Who...? Oh, I remember you! You were asking all those questions about Lord Sinclair's murder. You had all sorts of evid-whats-its.
textByHash.7e6c2f5e9a04e1dba9f4b802b83a4f78a9955565: No, I didn't pass Anna, I'm sure of that. I think I passed one of the other young Sinclairs, though. A man.
textByHash.8442d7d88579447762a89f3f25d943b74d4ce7bc: That was extremely reckless, Paul, but you're right, it did work out in the end.
textByHash.8862963dcb59392100507eeb162d6ebcb223e54f: Well I'm sure you'll think of something. Just remember to use your head.
textByHash.893cae978dad7b82c73dc65e607013d1f7d60208: Oh dear. Keep trying. I'm sure with a few tweaks you can make a head that will convince him.
textByHash.9399e1bdcaa3475de404379d9bcab7f66ffaaa07: You should take the giant piece of gingerbread you made and show it to Santa, he'll know we're back in business then.
textByHash.971cfdce93c2abe7c0342f1bae9c7e1caa0dbe1c: It is. What brings you here?
textByHash.9eef26168b7906b124bf6a9a12dca3a763039841: I can't remember. I just remember it being a man.
textByHash.9f5e0a25df60befb48e2dc5847b1d20e6ad5e44a: Hmm, it could be Anna's or David's.
textByHash.acac7db0f93fd59159f33e7672c737cb68170171: I was cleaning the library. I saw her come into the room.
textByHash.acad363214fe63c0df04f84c43f15a7cdf1306f9: I overheard Anna saying to Stanford that if he didn't do something about the state of his compost heap, she was going to.
textByHash.b35c31eb89f099730100a92948dfd63c34f2f836: Wonderful! You should show it to Gordon.
textByHash.b3fc39276dea6063e17ad81fb77a3857d518543f: Well keep your head up. I'm sure you'll manage it.
textByHash.b795785e9342285602d4c6b3c78771451b47c39b: I was in the kitchen with Hobbes and Louisa, helping with dinner. They gave me Lord Sinclair's meal. I went to deliver it and I found him...
textByHash.c11c29df8e8f4f3def0fa817c228e56d5606731c: Hello there. How goes the headhunt?
textByHash.c3b73777be146610d7f74b298d70ebb16b764167: Not to worry. If it keeps Gordon happy, so be it. Anyway, thank you for keeping our farm safe. With the beast dealt with, I've been able to get back to tanning again.
textByHash.c75369a3ad0b8d2da37226e06f42631d43066314: Not to worry. If it keeps Gordon happy, so be it. Anyway, you should go and let him know it's all done.
textByHash.cb0f9d573e11994752e524f2805c6a13b5de0a88: Jack Frost locked us in here when he stormed into our bakery. We tried to stop him from messing up our production, but he got grumpy.
textByHash.cc094b9bbfc57c5e1c42b343e2902e5d6692454b: Maybe Jack was onto something by using it to ice the Gingerbread Gnomes.
textByHash.cfad6f6e6f7c7dcc03053fca7798eefb3c05246c: She really doesn't get on well with Stanford. I really have no idea why. You'd really have to ask her though.
textByHash.d528bcfb5e2a314f4315309309f9241df7c5e507: Ah, that's good to hear. We've already lost a lot of livestock to it.
textByHash.d6354cc4c7b964b19a1ea457031aeff21d4f7778: I don't know anything about that.
textByHash.d67e449a1889b8c66b58d116e73fec64be255bc7: Not that I can think of.
textByHash.d6fd2d834b2813fe82408e94f5e2c6b3e95eb6d1: I was with Hobbes and Louisa in the Kitchen helping to prepare Lord Sinclair's meal, and then when I took it to his study... I saw... oh, it was horrible... he was....
textByHash.ddec8d3657811e9b94cbf747edaec179e0a58315: Wonderful! I'm sure this will convince him. You should show him what you've got.
textByHash.dece12476711cfe548460351d57f45bbdecededd: Oh dear. You should probably talk to Gordon about this.
textByHash.e24e12bf94048727ce09997e3a26f8dc7fdf5900: If it's not in here or in the back room, it must be in the cage with the Icelord.
textByHash.e356a72cdc0d10970879bfd5683a25d2db364c49: Anna? I don't know very much.
textByHash.f079ca528aaffbbf6c9cf763d483b460f4a3d3a1: Oh! I have an idea! If this beast ended up getting coated in flour, it wouldn't be hard for you to track it back to its home.
textByHash.f2991210a77082a8af7b1bef38cb6205fb3d1e59: I don't know what you mean.
textByHash.f476cbc637ec5135fd4b9245dce3c6487b139265: Keep at it! I've tried my hand at clay modelling in the past. You can make all sorts of things. Just get some soft clay and a knife and I'm sure you'll be able to make a lovely head.
textByHash.ff9e24a90d398e7983cc737cb5d735cda5393b68: I don't really remember hearing anything out of the ordinary.
